input.background: Suppose a population has 26 members identified with the letters A through Z.
input.question: Assume person A gets selected on the initial draw and you sample again without replacement. What is the probability of drawing person A on the second draw?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

population_size.description: The total number of members in the population.

initial_draw.description: The person selected on the initial draw.

second_draw_probability.description: The probability of drawing person A on the second draw without replacement.
